name: usb_devices
description: List connected USB devices with details (vendor, product, power)
command: echo '=== USB Devices ===' && lsusb 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== USB Tree ===' && lsusb -t 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== Block Devices ===' && lsblk -o NAME,SIZE,TYPE,MOUNTPOINT,FSTYPE 2>/dev/null
